comment: M4 dialogue portraits: one 64x64 bust per id in cast/characters.json plus hoca mood variants (hoca.png = neutral, hoca_tired, hoca_wry, hoca_listening). 32x32 art baked 2x; transparent background; whole cast holds one camera — 3/4 view facing slightly left toward the dialogue text, light from above-right. Consumes the same truth file as sprites.cast_sheets so sheets and portraits agree.
